macro.title: Live Updates: Iran war "re-escalation risks," new Trump threat keep oil prices high as diplomacy staggers on - CBS News

macro.title: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt booed by graduates at mention of AI - BBC
macro.summary: The reaction underscores a growing anxiety among students over AI's impact on jobs and their future careers.

macro.title: The Fed will have to raise interest rates in July to appease 'bond vigilantes,' Yardeni says - CNBC
